name: Romaine Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 slices, tomatoes (or use fresh green tomatoes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the lettuce, tomatillos, tomatoes, and avocado in a large bowl.
2. Sprinkle with olive oil and lime juice.
3. Garnish with coriander leaves to taste.
"Great Chefs of San Francisco". Posted by Rob Stewart
